nasb.text: ‘And some of your sons who will issue from you, whom you will beget, will be taken away, and they will become officials in the palace of the king of Babylon.’ ”

esv.text: And some of your own sons, who will come from you, whom you will father, shall be taken away, and they shall be eunuchs in the palace of the king of Babylon.”

cnv.text: 從你所出的眾子，就是你所生的，其中必有被擄去的，在巴比倫王宮裡作太監。”

ccb.text: 你的子孙当中必有人被掳去，在巴比伦王的宫中做太监。’”

csbs.text: ‘从你而出的、你亲生的儿子们中，必有被带到巴比伦王的宫中作太监的。’”
